name: instill-skills
description: A curated collection of agentic skills for coding workflows, DevOps, security, and OSS community management.

skills.name: git-master
skills.description: Advanced Git workflow orchestrator for Conventional Commits, Pull Requests, and conflict resolution.

skills.name: auto-doc-manager
skills.description: Synchronize and generate technical documentation (JSDoc, Docstrings, README, OpenAPI) from source code.

skills.name: tech-debt-loan-officer
skills.description: Analyzes code changes and PRs as financial liabilities, evaluating technical debt risk.

skills.name: security-audit-tool
skills.description: Comprehensive security audit using automated scanning tools (Semgrep, Snyk, Trivy).

skills.name: dependency-sentinel
skills.description: Safely audit and remediate dependency vulnerabilities (npm/pip) with zero breaking changes.

skills.name: generate-dockerfile
skills.description: Scans the project and generates a production-ready, multi-stage Dockerfile.

skills.name: architect-vision-audit
skills.description: High-level architect audit for alignment between project vision and codebase reality.

skills.name: debug-stacktrace-resolver
skills.description: Analyze and resolve complex software errors and stack traces with structured web research.

skills.name: oss-community-catalyst
skills.description: Audit and amplify Open Source project health, Markdown quality, and social engagement.

skills.name: improbable-recruiter
skills.description: Identifies cognitive/technical voids in the codebase and generates atypical job descriptions.
